idea-plugin.name: Samurai Test Runner
idea-plugin.description:
GoLand integration for the Samurai scoped testing framework.

Samurai is a Go testing framework with path isolation: you define a test tree using a single s.Test() method, the framework discovers all leaf paths, then runs each one independently with fresh local variables. Parallel by default, zero dependencies, bring your own assertions.

Plugin features:
  • Gutter run/debug icons on s.Test() calls
  • Run individual test paths or entire subtrees from the editor
  • Click test results in the tree to navigate back to source
  • Pass/fail status indicators in the gutter after test runs
  • Full integration with GoLand's native test runner and debugger

Requires github.com/zerosixty/samurai in your Go module.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • Single s.Test() API — supports both leaf tests and nested scopes
  • Gutter icons on all s.Test() calls with run/debug actions
  • Test result navigation from the test tree to source locations
  • Pass/fail status indicators in the gutter
  • Supports both samurai.Run() and samurai.RunWith()
